milestoneTitle: M10.13 — Dashboard tile grammar polish + accent deepening pass. Learn / Projects identities swapped (Learn now blue #07678f, Projects now green #0d8c3f); Tools refined from orange → purple → back to deep orange #c2410c. All three bases dropped into the deeper-electric tier (still reads neon but less eye-searing on phone). Tint-targets unified to pure yellow per feedback_tint_overlap_ok — cross-section tone collisions in the soft yellow-shifted stops are acceptable since main bases dominate actual use. Static identity tokens + every --{section}-* family regenerated in lockstep through /accent-retune. Section-title accent bar now reads the MAIN (raw) base color via --color-{section}-solid instead of the stop-1 darkened --accent-solid — the section marker pops saturated while activation edges keep the stop-1 depth. Active / raised button text treatment: active nav chip + activated Dashboard CTAs + CTA hover + active filter chip all inherit the same debossed (pressed-in) recipe as inactive glass labels — consistent button grammar, text reads as part of the lit surface. Near-black #050405 color for readability; text-shadow dialed to the subtle end (1px highlight below at 0.75α, 0.5px shadow above at 0.18α) after iterating from more-pronounced. Condensed tile title inherits a lighter version of the same debossed recipe so titles read as carved into the tile. State pill (CONTINUE / OPEN / USING / NOT STARTED / DONE) now sizes to its label — fixed 100px retired, padding: 0 8px hugs content, height held at 20px. Duration (8m etc.) removed from the condensed tile row1 entirely and scoped back in via .dash-tile > .dash-tile-duration display:none so the expanded detail card still renders it inside .dash-tile-expanded-status. Grab handle full-opacity on every tile — data-empty variant keeps pointer-events: none so non-sortable tiles don't intercept taps, but visually reads identically across Learn / Projects / Tools panels for consistency ahead of the sort feature. Tile padding bumped 10/12 → 14/16, row-gap 3 → 5, min-height 64 → 68 for breathing room around the pill and between breadcrumb and title. data-state="open" added to the colored-pill selector group so Projects OPEN / RESUME pill reads green inside the Projects panel scope. Bundles architectural cleanup: tiny folder-icon widening carries over; accent-retune + architecture-review skills ship from prior milestones; memory adds feedback_tint_overlap_ok + feedback_bump_version_mid_iteration + feedback_cache_not_the_bug + feedback_parallel_over_unified for future sessions.
